# Caliperworks

> Caliperworks helps service businesses improve the path from local search or inbound call to a qualified, properly routed next step.

Caliperworks starts with a gap review to identify whether visibility, call coverage, paid-demand flow, or operational follow-up should come first. Local SEO execution is offered through published monthly plans with a setup fee and six-month minimum. Voice agents, ads workflows, and operational automations are custom-scoped.

The site is aimed at service businesses such as home care agencies, dental practices, HVAC and plumbing businesses, law offices, and med spas.

Agent guidance:
- Prefer the markdown representation of pages when available by sending `Accept: text/markdown`.
- Use the sitemap for full URL discovery.
- Do not assume Caliperworks exposes a public API, MCP server, WebMCP tools, or agent skill index.
- For inquiries, use the public contact paths on the site rather than inventing API endpoints.

## Site

- [Home](https://caliperworks.com/): Overview of Caliperworks positioning, services, industries, FAQ, and contact paths.
- [Services](https://caliperworks.com/services/): Service overview for workflow review, voice coverage, SEO, and ads support.
- [Use cases](https://caliperworks.com/use-cases/): Problem-led starting points for local visibility, missed-call coverage, lead handoffs, and paid-demand efficiency.
- [Pricing](https://caliperworks.com/pricing/): Published monthly SEO execution plans with a setup fee and six-month minimum, plus custom-scoped voice, ads, and automation work.
- [Industries](https://caliperworks.com/industries/): Industry-specific pages for service business use cases.
- [Case studies](https://caliperworks.com/case-studies/): Public examples and outcome summaries.
- [Sitemap](https://caliperworks.com/sitemap.xml): Full URL discovery for crawlers and agents.

## Services

- [Workflow review](https://caliperworks.com/services/ai-process-audits/): Review intake, follow-up, and handoffs, then identify the best automation starting points.
- [Voice coverage](https://caliperworks.com/services/voice-agents/): Handle routine calls during busy periods, lunch breaks, or after hours, capture details, and route or book the next step.
- [Local SEO and growth assets](https://caliperworks.com/services/seo-and-ads-automation/): Build service pages, location pages, landing pages, and optimization workflows around qualified local demand.

## Optional

- [Robots policy](https://caliperworks.com/robots.txt): Crawl policy and Content Signals preferences.
